summary: Comprehensive testing of gate overrides, commission rates, 60% WR cutoff, and self-improvement features. All 14 backend tests passed (100%). All 12 frontend features verified via Playwright.

issues: 'Gates' section header text not visible (but all gate params ARE visible and editable)

passed_tests: POST /api/engines/{id}/nudge accepts gate overrides: rfit_min, conf_min, min_tier, wps_gate, band_cap
Gate overrides are persisted and returned in the response
Gate overrides are returned in engine summary under 'gates' and 'gate_overrides' fields
Gates field shows current vs needed values with needed reflecting overrides
Commission rates: crypto symbols get 0.05% per side (0.0005)
Commission rates: exchange symbols get 0.1% per side (0.001)
Crypto commission is exactly half of exchange commission
60% WR hard cutoff constant (OPERATIONAL_WR_CUTOFF = 0.60) exists in live_promotion.py
_meets_entry() correctly enforces 60% floor and 65%/1.5 entry threshold
Settings dropdown shows Trade Params section (SL%, TS%, Sig Prob, Dir Bias)
Settings dropdown shows Gates section (R-Fit Min, Conf Min, Tier Min, WPS Gate, Band Cap)
Clicking a gate value opens inline edit input
Entering value and pressing Enter saves via nudge API
WHY? column shows gate pass/fail status with current vs needed values
Band Cap gate row appears in WHY? column
Engines with READY status show 'READY TO TRADE' in green in WHY? column
Engines with WEAK FIT status show failing gates in red in WHY? column
PAUSE button works (fires nudge with pause:true)
RESET button works (fires POST /api/engines/{id}/reset)
Expanded dropdown shows all 5 columns correctly (WHY?, PERFORMANCE, REGIME, SETTINGS, PROMOTION)
seed_data_creation: None - system uses live WebSocket data from backend
context_for_next_testing_agent: Gate overrides feature fully implemented and tested. Key implementation details: (1) POST /api/engines/{id}/nudge accepts rfit_min, conf_min, min_tier, wps_gate, band_cap params, (2) gate_overrides stored in engine.local_state['gate_overrides'], (3) _get_gates() in base_engine.py uses overrides when set, (4) Commission rates: crypto 0.05% (CRYPTO_COMMISSION_RATE=0.0005), exchange 0.1% (DEFAULT_COMMISSION_RATE=0.001), (5) 60% WR cutoff in live_promotion.py (OPERATIONAL_WR_CUTOFF=0.60), (6) Self-improvement in _self_improve() adapts gate_overrides based on win rate tiers.

gate_overrides_api.description: POST /api/engines/{id}/nudge accepts and persists gate overrides (rfit_min, conf_min, min_tier, wps_gate, band_cap)

gates_in_summary.description: Engine summary includes 'gates' (current vs needed) and 'gate_overrides' fields

commission_rates.description: Crypto: 0.05% per side (0.0005), Exchange: 0.1% per side (0.001)

wr_cutoff.description: 60% WR hard floor enforced in _meets_entry() and record_real_trade()

settings_dropdown.description: Shows Trade Params (SL%, TS%, Sig Prob, Dir Bias) AND Gates (R-Fit Min, Conf Min, Tier Min, WPS Gate, Band Cap)

inline_edit.description: Clicking gate value opens inline edit input, Enter saves via nudge API

why_column.description: Shows gate pass/fail with current vs needed values, READY TO TRADE for OK engines, failing gates in red for WEAK FIT

pause_reset.description: PAUSE and RESET buttons work correctly

five_columns.description: Expanded dropdown shows WHY?, PERFORMANCE, REGIME, SETTINGS, PROMOTION columns

api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/engines/{id}/nudge: Accepts stop_loss_pct, trailing_stop_pct, signal_prob, direction_bias, rfit_min, conf_min, min_tier, wps_gate, band_cap, pause, resume
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/engines/summary: Returns all engine summaries with gates, gate_overrides fields
